title: Application
doc_html:
PART II.  AGE

§311.  Application

The prohibitions of this Part shall be limited to individuals who are at least forty years of age.

Acts 1997, No. 1409, §1, eff. Aug. 1, 1997; Acts 1999, No. 1366, §1.
doc_text:
PART II.  AGE
§311.  Application
The prohibitions of this Part shall be limited to individuals who are at least forty years of age.
Acts 1997, No. 1409, §1, eff. Aug. 1, 1997; Acts 1999, No. 1366, §1.
